meaning: n.&adj.反对吸烟(的) 禁止吸烟(的)
examples: The antismoking lobby was out to destroy our way of life and the government should stay out of the way?
In one state, all cities and most towns have antismoking ordinances.
The antismoking program called Rage Against the Haze failed once state funding was cut.
Sales dropped about 9.3% in 2009 under the weight of ever higher taxes and antismoking laws.
Jotham Coe was originally assigned to Pfizer's antismoking project in 1995 to find new raw materials for other chemists.
